mergewith.subtemplate:
<plugin spec='beast.base.spec.evolution.speciation.YuleModel' id="YuleModel.t:$(n)" tree='@Tree.t:$(n)'> <parameter name='birthDiffRate' id="birthRate.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam" domain="PositiveReal" value='1.0'/> </plugin>
<distribution id='YuleBirthRatePrior.t:$(n)' spec='beast.base.spec.inference.distribution.Gamma' param='@birthRate.t:$(n)'> <alpha spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam" domain="PositiveReal" value="0.01" estimate="false"/> <theta spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam" domain="PositiveReal" value="100.0" estimate="false"/> </distribution>
<operator id='YuleBirthRateScaler.t:$(n)' spec='beast.base.spec.inference.operator.ScaleOperator' scaleFactor="0.75" weight="3" parameter="@birthRate.t:$(n)"/>
Yule speciation prior on tree t:$(n)
Yule speciation process birth rate of partition t:$(n)
Scale birth rate of Yule prior of tree t:$(n)

<distribution id="BirthDeath.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.evolution.speciation.BirthDeathGernhard08Model" tree='@Tree.t:$(n)'> <birthDiffRate spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam" domain="PositiveReal" id="BDBirthRate.t:$(n)" value='1' /> <relativeDeathRate spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam" domain="UnitInterval" id="BDDeathRate.t:$(n)" value='0.5'/> </distribution>
<distribution id='BirthRatePrior.t:$(n)' spec='beast.base.spec.inference.distribution.Gamma' param='@BDBirthRate.t:$(n)'> <alpha spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam" domain="PositiveReal" value="0.01" estimate="false"/> <theta spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam" domain="PositiveReal" value="100.0" estimate="false"/> </distribution> <distribution id='DeathRatePrior.t:$(n)' spec='beast.base.spec.inference.distribution.Beta' param='@BDDeathRate.t:$(n)'> <alpha spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam" domain="PositiveReal" value="1.0" estimate="false"/> <beta spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam" domain="PositiveReal" value="1.0" estimate="false"/> </distribution>
<operator id='BirthRateScaler.t:$(n)' spec='beast.base.spec.inference.operator.ScaleOperator' scaleFactor="0.75" weight="3" parameter="@BDBirthRate.t:$(n)"/> <operator id='DeathRateScaler.t:$(n)' spec='beast.base.spec.inference.operator.ScaleOperator' scaleFactor="0.75" weight="3" parameter="@BDDeathRate.t:$(n)"/>
Birth-Death speciation prior on tree t:$(n)
Birth-Death speciation process rate of partition t:$(n)
Birth-Death relative death rate of partition t:$(n)
Scale birth rate of Birth-Death prior of tree t:$(n)
Scale relative death rate of Birth-Death prior of tree t:$(n)

<distribution id="CoalescentConstant.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.evolution.tree.coalescent.Coalescent"> <treeIntervals spec='beast.base.evolution.tree.TreeIntervals' id='TreeIntervals.t:$(n)' tree='@Tree.t:$(n)'/> <populationModel spec="beast.base.spec.evolution.tree.coalescent.ConstantPopulation" id='ConstantPopulation.t:$(n)'> <parameter name="popSize" id="popSize.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam" domain="PositiveReal" value='0.3' estimate='true'/> </populationModel> </distribution>
<operator id='PopSizeScaler.t:$(n)' spec='beast.base.spec.inference.operator.ScaleOperator' scaleFactor="0.75" weight="3" parameter="@popSize.t:$(n)"/>
<distribution id='PopSizePrior.t:$(n)' spec='beast.base.spec.inference.distribution.Gamma' param='@popSize.t:$(n)'> <alpha spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam" domain="PositiveReal" value="0.01" estimate="false"/> <theta spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam" domain="PositiveReal" value="100.0" estimate="false"/> </distribution>
Coalescent prior with constant population size on tree t:$(n)
Coalescent population size parameter of partition t:$(n)
Scale population size of Coalescent prior of tree t:$(n)

<distribution id="CoalescentExponential.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.evolution.tree.coalescent.Coalescent"> <treeIntervals spec='beast.base.evolution.tree.TreeIntervals' id='TreeIntervals.t:$(n)' tree='@Tree.t:$(n)'/> <populationModel spec="beast.base.spec.evolution.tree.coalescent.ExponentialGrowth" id="ExponentialGrowth.t:$(n)"> <parameter name="popSize" id="ePopSize.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam" domain="PositiveReal" value='0.3' estimate='true'/> <parameter name="growthRate" id="growthRate.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam" domain="Real" value='3e-4' estimate='true'/> </populationModel> </distribution>
<operator id='ePopSizeScaler.t:$(n)' spec='beast.base.spec.inference.operator.ScaleOperator' scaleFactor="0.75" weight="3" parameter="@ePopSize.t:$(n)"/> <operator id="GrowthRateRandomWalk.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.operator.RealRandomWalkOperator" scaleFactor='0.1' weight="3" scalar="@growthRate.t:$(n)"/>
<distribution id='ePopSizePrior.t:$(n)' spec='beast.base.spec.inference.distribution.Gamma' param='@ePopSize.t:$(n)'> <alpha spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam" domain="PositiveReal" value="0.01" estimate="false"/> <theta spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam" domain="PositiveReal" value="100.0" estimate="false"/> </distribution>
<distribution id='GrowthRatePrior.t:$(n)' spec='beast.base.spec.inference.distribution.Laplace' param='@growthRate.t:$(n)'> <mu spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam" domain="Real" value="0.001" estimate="false"/> <scale spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam" domain="PositiveReal" value="0.5" estimate="false"/> </distribution>
Coalescent prior with exponential population growth on tree t:$(n)
Coalescent population size parameter of partition t:$(n)
Coalescent growth rate of partition t:$(n)
Scale population size of Coalescent prior of tree t:$(n)
Random walk on growth rate of Coalescent prior of tree t:$(n)
